PackList.title: Crimson Classic
positive_prompts:
ABSOLUTE IDENTITY LOCK (MANDATORY): Use attached photo as ONLY facial reference. Preserve exact facial structure, eye shape, eye color, eyebrows, nose, lips, jawline, chin, skin texture, facial proportions.

A hyper-realistic cinematic portrait of a young woman with a classic 1950s Hollywood aesthetic, featuring a precise heart-shaped face, high defined cheekbones, and a slim nose with a soft bridge. Her eyes are almond-shaped with a sharp winged eyeliner, framed by groomed, arched eyebrows. She has a blonde vintage side-parted bob with structured finger waves. Her skin is rendered with forensic detail, showing natural skin grain, visible pores, and subtle texture without AI smoothing or plastic-like finish. She is dressed in a modest, high-neck red faux fur coat that completely covers her chest and shoulders, accented by a three-strand pearl necklace. She holds a sprig of green pine with realistic red berries. The lighting is a soft, directional studio setup from the upper left, creating gentle shadows on the right side of her face and natural catchlights in her eyes. Shot on a 85mm prime lens, f/1.8 for a shallow depth of field, with a solid deep crimson background. The final image has the quality of a high-resolution 35mm film photograph, emphasizing micro-details and authentic cinematic realism.
